notes:
v1.6.0 - Game Engine Patchers + Accessibility + Design System

- Bethesda Engine Patcher (Skyrim/Fallout/Oblivion/Starfield): BSA v103-105, BA2 GNRL/DX10, ESP/ESM
- CRI Middleware Patcher (Persona 5R/Yakuza/Tales of/Dragon Ball): CPK + CRILAYLA + MSG/BMD/FTD
- Unity Localization Package: StringTable + Addressables + Smart Strings validator
- Universal PO export (gettext) per tutti i patcher
- a11y: aria-label, semantic headings, focus-visible, skip-link, prefers-reduced-motion, forced-colors
- Design system: Card variants (cva), Button xs/icon-sm, text-micro/text-2xs utilities
- OCR: wiring a backend Tauri Tesseract
- Fix: console flash loop Windows quando l'app è in tray
